title: interval_registry candidate_intervals row
description: Schema for one row of interval_registry/candidate_intervals.tsv. Each row declares one candidate inversion interval. The candidate_id is the primary key and is referenced as a foreign key by results_registry manifest rows (where.candidate_id) and by evidence_registry per_candidate/<cid>/ directories.

candidate_id.description: Primary key. Convention: <chrom>_<N> where N is a per-chromosome counter. Examples: 'LG12_17', 'LG25_3'.

scale.description: Scale at which the candidate was detected, e.g. '100', '50'.

parent_id.description: If this candidate is nested inside another, the parent's candidate_id. Null or '.' for top-level candidates.
